title: Everbuild 204 Premium Evermix 3 in 1 Triple Action Mortar Admixture – Waterproofs – Plasticises and Retards to Assist Workability – 5 Litre
features: 3-IN-1 – This triple action mortar admix waterproofs, plasticises and retarders, reducing water penetration, improving workability and allowing large areas to be covered in one application.
VERSATILE – Formulated for use in renders including, dry dash and pebble-dashing. Use it in any cement mixture where waterproofing and increased workability are needed together with retarded setting.
IMPROVES DURABILITY – Once dry, this admix inhibits efflorescence, and improves insulation compared to non-added mixtures.
CHLORIDE FREE – Can be used internally or externally with a chloride ion content of < 0.1%). Will not corrode steel reinforcements, such as brick ties.
EASY TO USE – Add to mix at an addition rate of 250 to 500ml per 50kg cement depending on the degree of plasticising required. Always reduce the required quantity of water accordingly (up to 15%).
TWO SIZES – Available in a 5-litre or 25-litre can.
description: From the manufacturer Before use it’s important to ensure that the surface to which it is to be applied is clean and free from dust and loose material and that the structure has sufficient mechanical strength. All contaminants such as oil, grease, or any surface contamination must be removed to ensure adequate development of bond when the render is applied. Add 204 Evermixto the mix at an addition rate of 250 to 500ml per 50kg cement depending on the degree of plasticising/retardation required. Then add water to the mixing drum at an additional part of one-part 204 Evermix to 20/40 parts water. Once the mix is complete trowel onto the substrate area.
